requirement.description: The system shall evaluate vehicle speed, door status, and engine temperature together to determine whether one or more warnings must be activated.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify overspeed warning activates when speed exceeds threshold only.
Verify door-open warning activates when any door open and speed > 0.
Verify high-temperature warning activates when engine temperature exceeds limit.
Verify overspeed and door-open warnings activate together.
Verify overspeed and high-temperature warnings activate together.
Verify door-open and high-temperature warnings activate together.
Verify all warnings activate simultaneously when all conditions are met.
Verify no warnings activate when all parameters are within limits.
